channel.title: LuxeMia - Indian Ethnic Wear
channel.description: Shop quality Indian ethnic wear - bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, sherwanis, anarkali suits, and jewelry at LuxeMia. Flat rate shipping $25 per order, free on orders over $350.

Whether you are looking for the timeless rani pink bridal lehenga or the trending royal red bridal look, the rich silk and intricate handwork detailing make it a top choice for the contemporary bride!Key ComponentsLehenga: Raw Silk With Silk Lining and Double Can CanBlouse: Raw Silk Full work Front, Back & SleevesDupatta: Designer Soft Net Heavy DupattaIdeal For: Wedding, ReceptionThe lehenga & Blouse are shipped Semi Stitched & Colour may vary a little due to photographic differences Tailored for the bride who seeks an unmistakable couture presence, this ready-to-wear ensemble balances heritage craftsmanship with a modern silhouette, ensuring you carry the room the moment you enter. Every panel is finished by master karigars, and the palette is calibrated to flatter under both daylight ceremony mandaps and evening reception lighting. Lehenga Specifications Fabric: Raw Silk — chosen for its luxurious drape, structural flare, and photographic richness Color: Royal Red — a couture shade curated for sangeet couture occasions Handwork: Cutdana Handwork executed across the skirt panels, hand-applied by skilled artisans Flare: Generously flared kalidar construction for statement movement during bridal entry and vidaai Skirt Length: Standard ready-to-wear skirt length 42 inches; plus and custom-stitch tiers available for extended lengths Inner Lining: Premium inner cancan finish for volume retention throughout the celebration Hem Finish: Reinforced couture hem with concealed weighting for clean drape Blouse / Choli Fit & Customization Options Default Fit: Ready-to-wear standard cut finishing at the waist with concealed side hooks for a clean silhouette Standard Sizing: Fits bust up to 38 inches and waist up to 32 inches out of the box Plus Sizing: Plus variant fits bust up to 44 inches and waist up to 38 inches — select the Ready to Wear - Plus tier Custom Stitch Option: Need a different size or a deeper neckline, longer sleeves, or a redesigned back? Choose the Custom Stitched tier and submit measurements post-purchase Neckline Customization: Sweetheart, V-neck, boat neck, or high-neck — available with the Custom Stitched tier Sleeve Customization: Sleeveless, cap, elbow, three-quarter, or full sleeves — available with the Custom Stitched tier Back Design: Tie-back, hook-and-eye, or designer back detailing — available with the Custom Stitched tier Padding: Built-in bust pads included standard on every tier at no additional cost Dupatta Details Dupatta Fabric: Coordinated premium net or silk dupatta complementing the lehenga palette Embellishment: Cutdana Handwork border detailing with scattered buttis across the body Drape Length: 2.25 to 2.5 meters, ideal for over-the-head and shoulder drape styles Finishing: Hand-rolled hem with concealed stitch for a couture-grade finish Style Note: Suitable for double-dupatta bridal styling; second dupatta available on request Styling Suggestions Jewelry Pairing: Complement the warm reds palette with gold kundan and polki statement pieces — a choker with matching earrings and a maang tikka completes the bridal look Footwear: Opt for embellished juttis or block-heel sandals in metallic gold or blush to harmonize with the royal red lehenga Hairstyle: A low chignon with fresh florals or a side-swept curl with a paranda — both frame the face beautifully against cutdana handwork blouse detailing Makeup Direction: Soft smoky eyes with a dewy base and a warm reds-toned lip balances the ornate raw silk silhouette Occasion Pairing: Ideal for sangeet couture — style with a potli bag and kaleeras for full bridal impact, or pare back with a clutch for an engagement ceremony Photography Tip: The cutdana handwork catches natural light beautifully — schedule golden-hour portraits to maximize the couture impact Garment Care Cleaning: Dry clean only — do not hand wash, machine wash, or soak Storage: Store in a cool, dry place wrapped in muslin; avoid plastic covers to preserve fabric breathability Ironing: Reverse-iron on low heat; place a pressing cloth over cutdana handwork areas to protect threadwork Perfume: Apply perfume before wearing; avoid direct contact with raw silk and embellished zones Packaging: Shipped in a premium garment box with tissue and silica gel protection Lead Time: Ready-to-wear dispatches in 5-7 business days; custom-stitched tiers ship in 3-4 weeks

item.g:title: Maroon Silk Embroidery Lehenga Choli with Dupatta
item.g:description: Product Overview This Maroon lehenga choli in Silk is a perfect pick for your next festive celebration. Featuring beautiful embroidery work, this outfit brings together traditional craftsmanship and modern design. The premium Silk fabric offers a graceful drape and comfortable fit, making it ideal for all-day wear at festivals and cultural events. Design Details Fabric: Premium Silk known for its elegant sheen and comfortable drape. Work: Intricate Embroidery Work showcasing skilled hand craftsmanship. Lehenga Silhouette: Beautifully flared lehenga with a voluminous circular silhouette that creates graceful movement as you walk. Blouse/Choli: Matching Silk blouse piece with complementary embroidery work detailing. Can be customized to your preferred neckline and sleeve style. Dupatta: Festive matching dupatta in Silk with coordinated embroidery work and an ornate border. Lining: Soft cotton or satin lining for all-day comfort. Closure: Hook-and-eye with drawstring waistband for a secure, adjustable fit. Flair: Generous flare that creates a stunning silhouette. Styling Tips Style this maroon lehenga choli with statement jewelry — a choker necklace or layered necklaces with matching earrings work beautifully. Complete the look with embellished heels and a decorated clutch. For festivals and cultural events, opt for an elegant updo or soft waves, and consider a maang tikka for a traditional touch. Stitching Options Unstitched: Receive the lehenga, blouse, and dupatta as fabric pieces ready for tailoring. Total fabric: approximately 5-6 meters. Semi-Stitched: Lehenga skirt is partially stitched with side seams open. Blouse piece is pre-cut. Requires minimal tailoring. Custom Stitching: Provide your measurements and our expert tailors will craft the outfit to your exact specifications. Standard customization at no extra cost. Custom Sizing: Available in all sizes including plus sizes. We accommodate every body type with our made-to-measure service. Blouse Customization: Choose your preferred neckline (round, V-neck, sweetheart, boat neck), sleeve length (sleeveless, short, 3/4, full), and blouse length. Size Variants Available in sizes XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, 3XL, and Custom Size. Custom sizing is available — provide your measurements at checkout for a tailored fit. Plus-size friendly. Size Chart Refer to the size chart below to find your perfect fit. All measurements are in inches. Size Bust (inches) Waist (inches) Hips (inches) XS 32 26 36 S 34 28 38 M 36 30 40 L 38 32 42 XL 40 34 44 XXL 42 36 46 3XL 44 38 48 Custom Provide your measurements at checkout Color: Maroon

item.g:title: Rani Pink Faux Georgette Embroidery Palazzo Suit with Dupatta
item.g:description: Shop the Rani Pink Faux Georgette Embroidery Palazzo Suit with Dupatta at LuxeMia — a Rani Pink palazzo suit in Faux Georgette with embroidery. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez paired with palazzo bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with embroidery to complete the ensemble. The kameez features embroidery on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the palazzo provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for special occasions, this palazzo suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a statement necklace and kolhapuri sandals for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a readymade suit — pre-stitched and ready to wear straight out of the box. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48), simply pick your size and go. Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez with coordinated bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with zari threadwork to complete the ensemble. The kameez features zari threadwork on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the coordinated bottom provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for special occasions, this anarkali suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a maang tikka and embroidered juttis for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a readymade suit — pre-stitched and ready to wear straight out of the box. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48), simply pick your size and go. Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. Color: Yellow | Fabric: Silk | Work: Zari threadwork | Occasion: Special occasions Free shipping on orders over $350 to the USA, Canada, and Australia. Flat $25 shipping on orders under $350.

item.g:title: Pink Fendi Silk Embroidery Lehenga Choli
item.g:description: Product Overview This Pink lehenga choli in Fendi Silk is a perfect pick for your next special occasion. Featuring beautiful embroidery work, this outfit brings together traditional craftsmanship and modern design. The premium Fendi Silk fabric offers a graceful drape and comfortable fit, making it ideal for all-day wear. Design Details Fabric: Premium Fendi Silk known for its lightweight feel, elegant sheen, and comfortable drape. Work: Intricate Embroidery Work showcasing skilled hand craftsmanship. Silhouette: Flared lehenga skirt paired with a matching choli and dupatta. The voluminous silhouette creates a stunning bridal or festive look with beautiful movement. Neckline: Round neckline adorned with intricate embroidery that frames the face beautifully. Sleeves: Elegant full sleeves in Fendi Silk that complement the overall design. Dupatta: Comes with a matching fendi silk dupatta in pink featuring coordinated embroidery detailing. The dupatta length is approximately 2.25 meters, offering versatile draping options. Bottom: Voluminous lehenga skirt in fendi silk with a tailored waistband. Designed to flare beautifully and create stunning movement as you walk. Styling Tips Style this pink lehenga choli with gold or silver statement earrings and matching heels for a polished look at celebrations and gatherings. A sleek clutch and soft waves or a neat bun will complete the ensemble. For a more traditional touch, add bangles and a delicate necklace set. Stitching Options Ready-Made: Stitched and ready to wear. Available in standard sizes XS through 3XL. Select your size at checkout. Custom Stitching: Provide your measurements and our expert tailors will craft the outfit to your exact specifications. Includes standard customization at no extra cost. Custom Sizing: Available in all sizes including plus sizes. We accommodate every body type with our made-to-measure service. Size Variants Available in sizes XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL, and 3XL. Custom sizing is available — provide your measurements at checkout for a tailored fit. Plus-size friendly. Size Chart Refer to the size chart below to find your perfect fit. All measurements are in inches. Size Bust (inches) Waist (inches) Hip (inches) XS 32 26 34 S 34 28 36 M 36 30 38 L 38 32 40 XL 40 34 42 2XL 42 36 44 3XL 44 38 46 Custom Provide your measurements at checkout Color: Pink

Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez with coordinated bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with sequins embroidery to complete the ensemble. The kameez features sequins embroidery on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the coordinated bottom provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for festive celebrations, this anarkali suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a maang tikka and embroidered juttis for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a readymade suit — pre-stitched and ready to wear straight out of the box. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48), simply pick your size and go. Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. Color: White | Fabric: Silk | Work: Sequins embroidery | Occasion: Festive celebrations Free shipping on orders over $350 to the USA, Canada, and Australia. Flat $25 shipping on orders under $350.

item.g:title: Wine Crunchy Silk Zari Work Anarkali Suit — LuxeMia
item.g:description: Shop the Wine Crunchy Silk Zari Work Anarkali Suit — LuxeMia at LuxeMia — a Wine anarkali suit in Silk with zari threadwork. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez with coordinated bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with zari threadwork to complete the ensemble. The kameez features zari threadwork on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the coordinated bottom provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for festive celebrations, this anarkali suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a maang tikka and embroidered juttis for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a semi-stitched suit — partially tailored with adjustable seams for a customized fit. Minor alterations can be made by your local tailor for the perfect silhouette. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48). Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery.
